gist.headline: New Llamas in the pasture
gist.blurb: We've upgraded our default Llama route to Meta's 3.3-70B and added new Maverick and Scout variants. The Scout model even has eyes now, so you can send it images.
gist.summary: Upgraded the default Llama endpoint to Llama-3.3-70B-Instruct and introduced new vision-capable Maverick and Scout variants.
gist.impact: Developers get access to smarter, vision-capable Llama models directly through the standard text generation endpoint.
gist.visual_concept: The PR adds Meta Llama models, specifically mentioning 'scout' and vision capabilities. A cute pixel art llama wearing a scout hat interacting with Polly the bee, who is showing the llama a picture (representing vision).
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a fluffy, friendly llama wearing a tiny scout hat, looking curiously at a glowing picture frame held by the cute bee mascot. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
